features: 3 in 1 laser level ideal for most DIY projects
Includes a 2.4 metre measuring tape, horizontal and vertical spirit level vials and a laser pointer with a range of up to 15 metres.
An essential part of your toolkit.
description: From the manufacturer DEKTON products offer great value for money whilst incorporating useful features which improve performance and user experience. Where applicable, our products comply with the latest British and European regulations. All DEKTON products are manufactured to high quality standards that undergo excellent quality control through our partners worldwide. DEKTON 3 IN 1 Laser Level 3 in 1 laser level ideal for most DIY projects. Includes a 2.4 metre measuring tape, horizontal and vertical spirit level vials and a laser pointer with a range of up to 15 metres.
